steps.title: Spot the defining signal
steps.content: The passage directly signals the difference: household electronics fields are “many times stronger” than the fields from water moving through Earth's magnetic field. The blank must capture this difference in degree or extent.

steps.title: Find the word for strength
steps.content: Magnitude means the size, extent, or degree—the word that captures how the strength of their sensitivities differs. Firmness (solidity), gathering (collection), and orientation (direction) don't address levels of sensitivity. That matches choice A — A is correct.
